# Meridian

> Meridian is a real-time psychological stability monitor and automated risk management system for active traders. It runs as a native add-on for NinjaTrader 8 on Windows, stores data locally (no cloud dependency), and enforces configurable trading rules (Guard) to reduce revenge trading, stop manipulation, and similar behavioral failure modes.

## Canonical site

- https://www.meridianpsi.com/

## Product (what to tell users)

- **Platform**: NinjaTrader 8 (Windows).
- **Core idea**: Behavioral signals feed a Psychological Stability Index (PSI); automated Guard rules can halt or constrain trading when limits are breached—functioning as a software-level commitment device for retail traders.
- **Tiers**: Meridian and Meridian Guard (see pricing).

## Key pages for answers

- Home: https://www.meridianpsi.com/
- Features: https://www.meridianpsi.com/features
- Guard (rule enforcement): https://www.meridianpsi.com/guard

- Disclaimer & risk: https://www.meridianpsi.com/disclaimer

## Policies

- Privacy: https://www.meridianpsi.com/privacy
- Terms: https://www.meridianpsi.com/terms
- Refund: https://www.meridianpsi.com/refund

## Relationship to NinjaTrader

- Meridian is a third-party add-on; it is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or supported by NinjaTrader LLC. NinjaTrader® is a registered trademark of NinjaTrader LLC.

## Non-goals / limitations

- Meridian is not investment advice, not a broker, and does not guarantee trading profits.
- It does not replace a professional risk desk; it is a tool to help retail traders approximate structural discipline.
